## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run type-check` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] Tested in both dark and light mode (if UI change)
- [ ] Tested on mobile viewport (if UI change)
- [ ] Added/updated sitemap entry (if new page)
- [ ] Added SEO metadata: title, description, canonical, OG, Twitter, JSON-LD (if new page)
- [ ] Updated navigation data in `navbar/data.ts` (if new tool)
